architecture_comparison_report_instance.source: Real output of scripts.run_slm138_recursive_denoiser_fixture._run_fixture()['architecture_comparison'] against the committed SLM-138 fixture config (d_model=32, max_len=256, recursive_transition_layers=2, recursive_steps=2, real fixture tokenizer). Captured on 2026-07-21.

architecture_comparison_report_schema.active_parameter_count_definition: Elements receiving nonzero gradient from one concrete forward pass (measured via backward + grad!=0 count), distinct from parameter_count_total's full declared tensor sizes -- e.g. z_latent/pos/tok rows outside the indexed sequence positions contribute zero gradient and are excluded.
architecture_comparison_report_schema.block_evaluations_verified_against: Real forward-hook invocation counts on TransformerBlock instances (see test_architecture_comparison_report_block_evaluations_match_real_hook_counts), not merely the recursive_steps * recursive_transition_layers formula.
architecture_comparison_report_schema.validation: __post_init__ raises ValueError if contract_version mismatches, claim_class != 'wiring', parameter_count_delta is inconsistent with parameter_count_total, parameter_count_delta_matches_formula is mislabeled relative to recursive_zstate_parameter_delta, or a 'parity' key is ever present in as_dict().

docs_annotated: docs/design/quality-experiment-matrix.md (V18 section: new 'Annotation (SLM-240 / RSC-A04)' paragraph; SLM-138's wiring-only verdict is unchanged)
correction.docstring: src/slm_training/models/recursive_denoiser.py module docstring rewritten to state precisely: shared-transition parameter count is independent of recursive_steps (compute changes, not parameter count); R=1 preserves the public interface and compatible tensor shapes, NOT output equivalence; V1 always adds z_latent + ctx_proj relative to DenoiserTower with an exact formula; checkpoint layer-name compatibility applies only to the mapped/common transition layers (z-state keys require explicit initialization/migration, already true of migrate_to_shared_recursive_denoiser); no parameter-efficiency or quality claim exists until a matched control campaign runs (separate, later, out-of-scope issue).
correction.model_card_or_readme: Checked docs/MODEL_CARD.md and README.md for the same wording -- neither mentions SLM-138/SharedRecursiveDenoiserTower parity at all, so no correction was needed there (no new checkpoint is introduced by this issue, so no new model-card row was added either, per the issue's own instruction).

fixture_reporting.added_helper: _architecture_comparison(stacked, recursive, base_seed) -- reuses the shape_probe_inputs/shape_probe_context RNG namespaces (SLM-239/RSC-A03), harmless per isolated_draw's fork_rng guarantee
markdown_additions: 'Architecture comparison (SLM-240 / RSC-A04)' section: interface-compatible, output-shape-compatible, parameter-matched, parameter delta (+pct, whole-model-normalized), parameter_count_denoiser, behavioral parity, claim class, block evaluations per forward
Objective-decomposition warning inserted immediately above the raw stacked/recursive losses, referencing SLM-238's recursive_depth_aux_mode work

linear_context: Corrects a false parameter-parity claim in the SLM-138 shared recursive denoiser tower's docstring; replaces the misnamed test_recursive_steps_one_parity_with_denoiser_tower with explicit, independently-tested comparison dimensions. Comment on SLM-138 and link from SLM-233 (note only -- SLM-233 implementation out of scope).
note: This is a documentation/testing/reporting correction, not a new model or a training-objective change. SLM-138's wiring-only verdict is unchanged -- this only retracts an unsupported parity claim and adds machine-checked contracts. No parameter-matched architecture is implemented here (a separate, later, out-of-scope issue).

strengthened: test_checkpoint_migration_to_shared_recursive now asserts the exact set {denoiser.z_latent, denoiser.ctx_proj.weight, denoiser.ctx_proj.bias} is a subset of initialized_keys

verified_false_claim.quoted_text: With recursive_steps=1 and recursive_transition_layers equal to the old stacked layer count the tower has the same parameter count and layer names as DenoiserTower (the extra z-state path is new, so it is not byte-identical, but the public contract is preserved).
verified_false_claim.repo_wide_grep: grep -rn 'same parameter count' (and layer-name variants) across *.py/*.md (excluding node_modules/.venv) found exactly one occurrence: this docstring. No other design doc, model card, README, or generated fixture prose carried the same wording.
verified_false_claim.why_false: The same paragraph already acknowledged the new z-state path (z_latent, ctx_proj), which necessarily changes the parameter count -- the 'same parameter count' clause directly contradicts the sentence's own premise.
